task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface (or equivalent dive log) application window is visible on the screen.
Dive #2 (dated 2010-12-04, location Sund Rock) is highlighted or selected in the application's dive list.

task_completion.description: Access the location or coordinates input field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive details panel is open, and the GPS coordinates or location input field is visible and active for the selected dive.
The values '47.4005' (Latitude) and '-123.1420' or '123.1420 W' (Longitude) are visible in the coordinate input fields.

task_completion.description: Verify the coordinates are applied to the dive
task_completion.visual_evidence: The updated coordinates are displayed as saved in the dive's information panel, or the map view shows a pin updated to the new coordinates for Dive #2.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's GUI to update the coordinates
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and typing within the dive log application's interface, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not edit the underlying save file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen opening the .ssrf XML file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually change the coordinates.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual dive log software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a genuine dive log application (e.g., Subsurface) and not a mock UI or a generic text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Dive: Dive #2 (Date: 2010-12-04, Location: Sund Rock, Hoodsport, WA, USA). Target Coordinates: Latitude 47.4005, Longitude -123.1420 (or 123.1420 W). A tolerance of 0.02 degrees is acceptable for the final coordinates.
